Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Defining the Transformation Im currently focused on defining the transformation of raw Windows system logs into a structured process mining event log Specifically Im concentrating on mapping the raw data to the required event log schema This involves identifying key elements such as event names timestamps and case identifiers

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Refining the Mapping Im now structuring these low level actions into more meaningful higher level activities within each case This includes adding essential attributes and articulating the reasoning behind these groupings Im taking a particular example and translating it into a structured event log

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Defining Case Boundaries Ive been working on defining case boundaries treating each document as a discrete case as this seems to be the most logical grouping for user work My reasoning is the target artifact approach as it allows us to group actions that are focused on a specific document This now seems more appropriate than other options I initially considered

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Establishing Case Identification Im now establishing robust case IDs based on document and window names I will use a standardized naming convention such as CASE DOC1 CASE EMAIL or CASE BUDGET Im starting to generate examples

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Im working on high level activity names Im starting to formalize the abstraction logic Ive grouped activities like FOCUS SWITCH as Open Resume Document and continuous TYPING as Edit Content Im determining which sequences should be combined or kept separate for more abstract names Email and PDF sequences are also being formalized I am breaking down the high level activities into smaller constituent units for example Open Email Review Email Draft Reply and Send Email

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Formalizing Activity Naming Im standardizing activity names and simplifying descriptions For example FOCUS and SWITCH are consistently Open Resume Work Item TYPING will be abstracted to Edit Content with SCROLL and HIGHLIGHT becoming Review and Annotate Document Im now mapping specific sequences from the log lines into my standardized activity names focusing on individual actions and their timestamps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Mapping Specific Log Entries Im translating specific log entries into activity names Im taking a sequence with actions across different applications and extracting standardized activities and attribute values For example Save Document1 becomes Save Work Item and Switch to Email is Open Resume Work Item Im also capturing relevant attributes such as the case name for each action

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Formalizing Attribute Extraction Im now focusing on attribute extraction Im taking the sequence of actions and populating the event log columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Application Resource Artifact and Additional Info Im also conducting a narrative check ensuring that the log accurately represents the users workflow where they are multi tasking My goal is to create a clear and complete event log

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Standardizing Activity Mapping Ive standardized activity names for clarity and process mining compatibility Im unifying Edit Content across applications and tailoring others like Save Work Item for specific actions I will use names such as Resume Work Item Edit Content Save Work Item Read Review Content Annotate Content Initiate Reply Send Communication and Close Work Item Im also mapping sequences For example I am mapping specific actions like resuming the Quarterly Report opening and editing Document1 and finally saving the work

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Mapping Specific Sequence Im now mapping a specific sequence of actions and formalizing the abstraction into distinct event log entries as in the example Ive taken actions from 090145 to 090815 and formalized a series of actions such as opening resuming work items editing content and sending communications I am ensuring that I have all the corresponding timestamps applications and artifacts
